title: Wisps
description: Wisps are one-time shop effects inspired by Charms, redesigned for Enchanted Wilds.

info.title: Shop timing
info.description: Wisps appear in the rightmost shop slot every other round and can only be purchased during the planning phase.

info.title: One per round
info.description: You can buy up to one Wisp each round. If you skip it, the unit hidden behind the Wisp is revealed after planning.

info.title: Seven categories
info.description: Wisps are grouped into Champion, Combat, Misc, Shop, Gold/XP, Risky, and Item categories, with colors that make them easier to scan.

info.title: Late-game combat
info.description: As the game progresses, Wisps become stronger and more expensive. After Stage 5, every other Wisp offer is a Combat Wisp.

all_wisps_description: Explore all 200 Wisps coming in Set 18 by category.

wisps.name: Grandmaster
